shots.prompt: The crystal walls assemble into a colossal kaleidoscope temple of glowing sacred geometry, mirrored infinitely in every direction. Breathtaking, seamless continuation.
Playful geometric light-beings weave and dance through the temple, braiding ribbons of neon color into impossible patterns. Joyful, hypnotic motion.
The fractal entities multiply into a spinning mandala of countless dancing forms, the whole temple pulsing in kaleidoscopic symmetry. Overwhelming beautiful pattern.
The point of view dissolves and merges into the pattern itself, individual shapes melting into one flowing field of pure luminous geometry. Blissful ego-dissolution.
